hooks.command: echo '=== HARNESS STATE ===' && if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.harness/tasks.md" ]; then echo '--- Tasks ---' && grep -E '\- \[[ ~]\]' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.harness/tasks.md" 2>/dev/null | head -10; fi && if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.harness/decisions.md" ]; then echo '--- Pending Decisions ---' && grep -E '\- \[ \]' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.harness/decisions.md" 2>/dev/null | head -10; fi && if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.harness/log.tsv" ]; then echo '--- Recent Log ---' && tail -5 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.harness/log.tsv"; fi && if [ -d "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/rules" ]; then echo '--- Rules ---' && find "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/rules" -name '*.md' -exec cat {} + 2>/dev/null; fi

hooks.prompt: Check if the agent is stuck in a loop. Signs: 1) Same file edited 3+ times in last 5 tool calls with similar changes. 2) Same test failed 3+ times with same error. 3) Reverting and re-applying similar changes. If stuck: respond {"ok": false, "reason": "Loop detected. Write the blocker to .harness/decisions.md, skip this task, move to the next one."}. If not stuck: {"ok": true}.

hooks.command: echo 'Account quota likely exhausted. Stashing work.' >&2 && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git stash push -m "harness-autosave-$(date +%s)" 2>/dev/null; echo '{"additionalContext": "Rate/billing limit hit. Commit any pending work, then stop."}'
